title: Devil Bat's Daughter
writer: Griffin Jay, Ernst Jäger, Leo J. McCarthy
actors: Rosemary La Planche, John James, Michael Hale
plot: Wishing to dispose of his wife, psychiatrist Doctor Elliott makes his patient Nina think that she suffers from a compulsion to kill. He drugs Nina, murders his wife and leaves evidence that points to Nina. The latter, pre-conditio...
